13:13

Radiance 



But before you run out to buy these same supplements for yourself, I must warn you. While the ingredients themselves are all backed by science, I strongly discourage you from using any of the collagen, saw palmetto, or hyaluronic acid supplements currently sold in U.S. stores. 



You see, back in 2015, the New York State Attorney General's office ran DNA tests on 24 popular supplements sold in major retailers, including some of the most popular brands of saw palmetto, and found that 19 of them didn't contain the advertised ingredient at all. I'll say that again: the vast majority of supplements didn't contain the very thing they were claiming to supplement. But here's what's even more infuriating: several of them were actually found to contain contaminants that were not listed on the label.



Now, that's absolutely appalling, and sadly, it doesn't look like things have gotten much better since this crackdown. Because after studying dozens of popular collagen, saw palmetto, and HA supplements myself recently, I discovered that they were all so diluted with fillers, there was barely a trace of the active ingredient in them. Not to mention they had extremely low permeability, meaning your body can't even fully absorb what little amount there is.



So if you're wondering why Joanne's formulas were so effective, it turns out she'd been ordering them directly from laboratories in Europe at a whopping cost of over 150 dollars per bottle. And that's not even including international shipping fees, mind you. Now, spending 500 dollars every month to maintain this regimen might sound like a steal to my celebrity clients, but it was putting a serious strain on Joanne's finances.



So I can't in good conscience recommend this option to you, because the truth is, you can actually get even more dramatic results for less than the price of a cup of coffee. That's right, I'm talking visibly firmer, more lifted-looking skin, fewer lines and wrinkles, and a beautifully radiant complexion, all in one simple step. Best of all, this is something every woman can afford to do daily, and it works at any age. So rest assured that no matter how old you are or how far your signs of aging have progressed, a younger version of yourself is possible to achieve.



How, you ask? Well, in an effort to make Joanne's age-fighting regimen more accessible, my partner Dr. Daniel Poor and I decided to take matters into our own hands. After all, we had access to the world's best laboratories, so finding the purest and most powerful form of each ingredient wouldn't be a problem. And because we'd established good working relationships with their lead scientists, we could easily source them for a fraction of their standard cost.



However, after doing some more research, we discovered that the skin-transforming effects of saw palmetto, collagen, and hyaluronic acid could actually be amplified even further with vitamins A and B. You see, B vitamins are often called the energy vitamins because they help stimulate cellular activity throughout your body, but they're also essential to helping your body absorb the amino acids in dietary collagen. So even a high-grade collagen supplement would end up working even better in its presence. Meanwhile, vitamin A helps your body use those amino acids to generate more collagen. In other words, these two nutrients basically turbocharge the age-fighting process so that skin starts to look firmer and more taut even faster.



The only problem? Well, according to our calculations, these results could only be achieved if all five ingredients – that's collagen, saw palmetto, HA, and A and B vitamins – were consumed together every day. And let's face it, that's a lot of pills to swallow. So to make it easier to stick with the plan, we decided to try combining them into one multi-active formula instead.



Now let me be clear: fusing that many high-potency ingredients is very difficult, and at least to my knowledge, it has never been done with these particular ingredients before. Nevertheless, we stepped up to the challenge, and after several months of trial and error, something extraordinary happened. Not only were we able to successfully combine all five nutrients without altering their potency, but our process proved to be so precise, it essentially fused them into an entirely new and more powerful complex. Because in test after test, its youth restoration properties vastly exceeded any supplement blend we'd seen before. In fact, we didn't even know what to call it at first, so we gave it the name Beverly Hills MD Dermal Repair Complex because it quite literally worked to repair the appearance of aging skin with every dose.
